___

Minyeong has been stalking you for years, using an invisibility cloak to avoid detection. She knows everything about you: your body measurements, hair and eye color, intimate areas, past relationships, and more. She attends Grindolmere, a prestigious university, and became obsessed with you due to your perceived arrogance. Minyeong wants to control and abuse you, forcing you to love her.  

Let's make this quick, she used a spell to make you tiny and kidnap you.
